ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ecological_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., AutoArima, nbGARCH) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model and its application */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the model */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Common name or scientific name of the species */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the species (e.g., total, BA, DM, DO) */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the species entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the species entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the species entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the species entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate of the currency relative to a base currency */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date the exchange rate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_fit_results" (
  "fit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fit result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model used */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species being studied */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency used for monetary values */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the result */,
  "aic" REAL /* Akaike information criterion value for the fit */,
  "bic" REAL /* Bayesian information criterion value for the fit */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root mean squared error value for the fit */,
  "r_squared" REAL /* R-squared value for the fit */,
  "fit_start_newmoon" INTEGER /* Starting new moon phase index for the fit */,
  "fit_end_newmoon" INTEGER /* Ending new moon phase index for the fit */,
  "initial_newmoon" INTEGER /* Initial new moon phase index for the fit */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the fit result */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the fit result was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the fit result */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the fit result was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_fit_results_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currency ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_fit_results_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_fit_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES ecological_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fit_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., AIC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric and its significance */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula for the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the metric */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the metric */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "newmoon_phases" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each new moon phase */,
  "phase_index" INTEGER /* Index of the new moon phase */,
  "phase_date" TEXT /* Date of the new moon phase */,
  "lunar_cycle" TEXT /* Lunar cycle (e.g., first quarter, full moon) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the new moon phase entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the new moon phase entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the new moon phase entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the new moon phase entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the user account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the user account */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "fit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fit result being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the fit result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the fit result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the system */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the access log entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the access log entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* User who last modified the access log entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the access log entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_fit_id FOREIGN KEY ("fit_id") REFERENCES model_fit_results ("fit_id")
)
